data.content: Approved in implementation_review. Reviewed branch knots-76a8/worktree-hint at dc823ba. The change keeps the existing knot-not-found text and appends a worktree recovery hint via main::format_error only for AppError::NotFound, leaving other error paths unchanged. Tests cover hint-present, hint-absent, and knot ID preservation in src/main_tests.rs. Verified clean worktree and make sanity passing in /private/tmp/knots-76a8, including coverage at 95.09%.
